task_name: HumanX EasySurg Training System Product Demonstration
cannot_score_reason: This video is a product demonstration and marketing presentation for the HumanX EasySurg surgical training system. It contains only slides, product images, narration about training systems, and overview of the phantom capabilities. There is no actual performance of any FLS task (peg transfer, pattern cut, endoloop, extracorporeal suture, or intracorporeal suture) to assess.
video_content_summary: Title slide: HumanX Tailored Surgical Training Tools
Instructional slide: Question about different training systems for product development and distribution
Numbered slides (6, 1) introducing HumanX EasySurg Training System concept
Product images showing basic foam phantom (closed torso) without organs
Product images showing fully equipped phantom with anatomical structures (liver, vessels, intestines, organs)
Demonstration of vascular flow pump setup and HF-Generator connection for high-frequency surgery capability
Closing slides with company contact information and music attribution

verbal_cues: How many different training systems do you use to develop a new product, distribute it and train your users?
Imagine there would be one surgical phantom that could be used for any application
It's not another box trainer – it's a surgical playground
Fully equipped with organs, bones, main vessels and skin
Replace every single organ to your special needs
Hook up a pump to add vascular flow
Connect your HF-Generator to enable HF-Surgery
product_features_highlighted: Universal surgical phantom for multi-application training

confidence_rationale: Video classification is certain. This is definitively a product demonstration video with no trainee performance footage. No FLS task is executed, so no scoring is applicable.
scoring_conclusion: NOT SCORED — This is instructional/marketing content, not a performance video. The video is informational only and contains no executable FLS task performance to assess.
